summary: Phase 1 Monolith Deconstruction VERIFIED: All 14 backend tests passed. Security P0 (4 endpoints now require auth - calibration/status, calibration/init, calibration/brain, executive-mirror), Route extraction (soundboard.py, data_center.py) working correctly with auth dependencies, Health endpoints accessible. Frontend landing page and login page load correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Monolith Deconstruction complete. Security P0 verified: /api/calibration/status (GET), /api/calibration/init (POST), /api/calibration/brain (POST), /api/executive-mirror (GET), /api/data-center/upload (POST) all return 401/403 without auth. Route extraction verified: /api/soundboard/* routes in routes/soundboard.py, /api/data-center/* routes in routes/data_center.py. Health endpoints: /health (internal K8s probe at localhost:8001), /api/health (public). Zombie purge completed - 14 files archived to /_backups/zombie_purge_Feb2026/.
